infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Wheelers uses your location to set pickups, find rides, and keep trip tracking accurate.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: Wheelers uses your location during and between ride stages so live tracking, safety tools, and trip progress stay accurate.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysUsageDescription: Wheelers uses your location in the background during rides so trip progress and safety monitoring keep working.

plugins.cameraPermission: Wheelers needs camera access to verify your face before a group ride.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Wheelers uses your location at all times during rides so live tracking, safety tools, and trip progress stay accurate.
plugins.locationAlwaysPermission: Wheelers uses your location in the background during rides so trip progress and safety monitoring keep working.
plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: Wheelers uses your location to set pickups, find rides, and keep trip tracking accurate.

foregroundService.notificationBody: Location stays active for live trip progress and safety updates.
